title: Upload history
processing_note: Applying the changes and recalculating balances. This may take a moment; please don't close this window.

empty.none: You haven't uploaded any statements yet.

reassign_dialog.title: Reassign upload to another account
reassign_dialog.description: You're about to move this {{entity}} upload and its {{count}} movements to another account. Use this if you uploaded the statement to the wrong account.
reassign_dialog.no_targets: There are no other accounts to reassign to.
reassign_dialog.duplicate_error: The target account already contains these movements. Nothing was moved.

delete_dialog.title: Delete upload
delete_dialog.warning: This {{entity}} upload and its {{count}} movements will be deleted. The account balances will be recalculated.
delete_dialog.confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete it?
delete_dialog.confirm_warning: This action cannot be undone. The movements imported in this upload will be permanently removed.
